Query
  Pipeline
    Stage drop
      Pattern trace_id
      Pattern span_id
      Pattern instance
      Pattern memory_mb
      Pattern cpu_pct
    Stage keep
      Pattern level
      Pattern service
      Pattern method
      Pattern path
      Pattern status
      Pattern duration_ms
      Pattern message
      Pattern timestamp
    Stage head
      N 3
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident timestamp
